description: So far, ASPIA has helped my organization and our clients in streamlining the vulnerability management process. We have saved lot of time which would have otherwise been wasted on creating word reports and constant email/mobile communications between multiple teams for each and every vulnerability resolution.The tool has also given management and leadership an accurate grasp on the security hygiene of their organization's assets and how to improve it.
author: Yash M.
pros: This software allows for highly efficient collaboration and communication between testers and application/asset owners for vulnerability reporting and remediation process. I like how a central collection of vulnerabilities is present which increases the speed of report writing for my team. As an admin, I can add vulnerabilities and their accurate descriptions, impact, recommendations and references to the collection and my team just has insert personal observations and proof-of-concept of issues discovered. Scan reports from Nessus, Acunetix, etc., can also be imported in the report. Before sending the reports, a manager can review the report by using the eye view feature which lets one know how the report will look post submission.I also liked the issue management process post report submission. If a developer or application owner has fixed only certain number of issues, they can highlight this in the tool using comments and changing the status from 'In progress' to 'In review' and submit them for re-test. This provides flexibility to the application owner in their issue remediation process and helps testers in conducting timely re-test.
cons: There were many cons at the start when I first started using the software but the ASPIA team has been highly receptive to my feedback and open to discussion on new features to be implemented. If the email settings are not properly configured and understood by an admin or manger, this can result in lot of clutter in the inbox. Be sure to discuss this with ASPIA team to avoid the issue.

author: Rahul K.
pros: I am using ASPIA for the last year and must say it has been an excellent experience. ASPIA has helped to automate and simplify the application security process, enabling us to reduce security risks. One of the standout features of ASPIA is its ability to deliver secure applications while achieving faster vulnerability remediation. This feature has saved significant time and resources.Another feature that I have found valuable is its ability to provide distinct insights into the security of enterprise applications. This functionality has helped us make informed decisions about the security of applications and prioritize remediation efforts based on the potential impact on security.I highly recommend ASPIA to anyone looking to enhance their application security. Its ability to simplify workflow, reduce security risk, and provide distinct insights makes it an essential tool for anyone concerned about their application security.
cons: I have found no significant cons to the tool. ASPIA is a reliable and efficient application security platform that simplifies the process of securing enterprise applications.
